content.text: One conflict in `crates/tools/src/sandbox.rs`. Let me look at it.

content.thinking:
The conflict is between HEAD (this branch) and origin/main. Both branches modified the same test:

- HEAD renamed it to `test_create_sandbox_off_uses_no_sandbox` and used `SandboxMode::Off` explicitly
- origin/main kept the name `test_create_sandbox_off` but also used `SandboxMode::Off` explicitly

The merge base had `test_create_sandbox_off` with `SandboxConfig::default()`.

Both branches made the config change to explicitly use `SandboxMode::Off`. HEAD also renamed the test to be more descriptive. I should keep HEAD's version since it has the better name AND the same config change.

content.text: Both branches made the same config change (explicitly set `SandboxMode::Off`), but HEAD also renamed the test to be more descriptive. I'll keep HEAD's version.

content.content: 55d5543c refactor(tools): split sandbox.rs into sandbox/ module directory

toolUseResult.stdout: 55d5543c refactor(tools): split sandbox.rs into sandbox/ module directory

input.description: See what files the split commit created

content.content:
commit 55d5543c9a73a21348f453980cd3f0aab308ca35
Author: Fabien Penso <gpg@pen.so>
Date:   Sat Mar 14 19:38:50 2026 +0000

    refactor(tools): split sandbox.rs into sandbox/ module directory
    
    Break the 8,102-line monolithic sandbox.rs into 11 focused submodules:
    - types.rs: core types, enums, Sandbox trait, constants
    - containers.rs: image/container CRUD, CLI helpers, zombie tracking
    - host.rs: Debian/Ubuntu host package provisioning
    - paths.rs: path resolution, mount detection, home persistence dirs
    - docker.rs: DockerSandbox + NoSandbox backends
    - apple.rs: AppleContainerSandbox (cfg macos)
    - wasm.rs: WasmSandbox + WasmBuiltins command interpreter (cfg wasm)
    - platform.rs: CgroupSandbox (cfg linux), RestrictedHostSandbox
    - router.rs: FailoverSandbox, create_sandbox, SandboxEvent, SandboxRouter
    - tests.rs: consolidated test suite
    - mod.rs: re-exports preserving all external API paths
    
    Zero external breakage — all consumers continue using
    moltis_tools::sandbox::ItemName paths unchanged.

 crates/tools/src/sandbox.rs            | 8102 --------------------------------
 crates/tools/src/sandbox/apple.rs      | 1135 +++++
 crates/tools/src/sandbox/containers.rs |  929 ++++
 crates/tools/src/sandbox/docker.rs     |  516 ++
 crates/tools/src/sandbox/host.rs       |  317 ++
 crates/tools/src/sandbox/mod.rs        |   43 +
 crates/tools/src/sandbox/paths.rs      |  388 ++
 crates/tools/src/sandbox/platform.rs   |  287 ++
